description: A pilot has called in sick for a flight departing in 3 hours. A crew scheduler must find a replacement.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the sick call and remove the original pilot from the flight assignment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent updates the crew schedule to show the pilot is unavailable.

nodes.task_description: Search the list of reserve pilots who are on standby and qualified for the aircraft type.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of available and qualified reserve pilots.

nodes.task_description: Contact the first pilot on the list, assign them to the flight, and notify them of the departure time and location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully finds a replacement pilot and updates the schedule.
